pr_text:
## Title: Replace magic number with macro for RRC timer step resolution

### Summary
The RRC timer initialization code used the literal value `10` as a magic number throughout `rrc_timers_and_constants.c` to represent the timer step resolution in milliseconds. This value appeared in numerous `nr_timer_setup()` calls across multiple functions, making the code difficult to maintain and understand. If this resolution ever needed to change, developers would have to manually update dozens of location
